ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "heel_to_toe_inches" REAL /* Heel to toe length in inches */,
  "us_men_size" REAL /* US Men's shoe size */,
  "us_women_size" REAL /* US Women's shoe size */,
  "eur_size" TEXT /* European shoe size */,
  "heel_to_toe_cm" REAL /* Heel to toe length in centimeters */,
  "shoe_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the conversion is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_heel_to_toe_inches FOREIGN KEY ("heel_to_toe_inches") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_shoe_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_heel_to_toe_cm FOREIGN KEY ("heel_to_toe_cm") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shoe type is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the shoe type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size standard is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the size standard */,
  "measurement_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_measurement_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement unit is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe model */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of shoe */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the shoe */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shoe model is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the shoe model */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the shoe model is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_models_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES shoe_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sizes" (
  "model_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model size */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the shoe model available in this size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model size is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the model size */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the shoe model in this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sizes_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sizes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES shoe_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, marketer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "source_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source size standard */,
  "source_size" TEXT /* Size in the source standard */,
  "target_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target size standard */,
  "target_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the target standard */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conversion request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the request is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_requests_target_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_requests_source_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report template */,
  "template_file" TEXT /* File path to the report template */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report template is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generated_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generated report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the generated report is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generated_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generated_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)
